mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ALARM_HISTORY ( line_id, alarm_code, value, created_at, deleted_at, read_at ) VALUES ( #{lineId}, #{alarmCode}, #{value}, NOW(6), NULL, NULL )

INSERT INTO ALARM_HISTORY ( line_id, alarm_code, value, created_at, deleted_at, read_at ) VALUES
( #{lineId}, #{alarmCode}, #{value}, NOW(6), NULL, NULL )
INSERT INTO ALARM_HISTORY ( line_id, alarm_code, value, created_at, deleted_at, read_at ) SELECT line_id, #{alarmCode}, #{value}, NOW(6), NULL, NULL FROM LINE
INSERT INTO ALARM_HISTORY ( line_id, alarm_code, value, created_at, deleted_at, read_at ) SELECT fl.line_id, #{alarmCode}, #{value}, NOW(6), NULL, NULL FROM FAMILY_LINE fl WHERE fl.role = 'OWNER'
INSERT INTO ALARM_HISTORY ( line_id, alarm_code, value, created_at, deleted_at, read_at ) SELECT fl.line_id, #{alarmCode}, #{value}, NOW(6), NULL, NULL FROM FAMILY_LINE fl WHERE fl.role = 'MEMBER'
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ALARM_HISTORY ah
LEFT JOIN ALARM_SETTING s ON s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
WHERE ah.line_id = #{lineId} AND ah.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( ah.alarm_code = 'OTHERS' OR s.user_id IS NULL OR ( (ah.alarm_code = 'FAMILY' AND s.family_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'USER' AND s.user_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'POLICY_CHANGE' AND s.policy_change_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'POLICY_LIMIT' AND s.policy_limit_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'PERMISSION' AND s.permission_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'QUESTION' AND s.question_alarm = TRUE) ) )

SELECT ah.alarm_history_id AS alarmHistoryId, ah.line_id AS lineId, ah.alarm_code AS alarmCode, ah.value, CASE WHEN ah.read_at IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS isRead, ah.created_at AS createdAt
FROM ALARM_HISTORY ah
LEFT JOIN ALARM_SETTING s ON s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
WHERE ah.line_id = #{lineId} AND ah.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( ah.alarm_code = 'OTHERS' OR s.user_id IS NULL OR ( (ah.alarm_code = 'FAMILY' AND s.family_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'USER' AND s.user_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'POLICY_CHANGE' AND s.policy_change_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'POLICY_LIMIT' AND s.policy_limit_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'PERMISSION' AND s.permission_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'QUESTION' AND s.question_alarm = TRUE) ) )
AND ah.read_at IS NOT NULL
AND ah.read_at IS NULL
AND ah.alarm_code = #{code}
ORDER BY ah.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ALARM_HISTORY ah
LEFT JOIN ALARM_SETTING s ON s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
WHERE ah.line_id = #{lineId} AND ah.deleted_at IS NULL AND ah.read_at IS NULL
AND ( ah.alarm_code = 'OTHERS' OR s.user_id IS NULL OR ( (ah.alarm_code = 'FAMILY' AND s.family_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'USER' AND s.user_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'POLICY_CHANGE' AND s.policy_change_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'POLICY_LIMIT' AND s.policy_limit_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'PERMISSION' AND s.permission_alarm = TRUE) OR (ah.alarm_code = 'QUESTION' AND s.question_alarm = TRUE) ) )
mapper.update: UPDATE ALARM_HISTORY SET read_at = NOW(6) WHERE line_id = #{lineId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND read_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT alarm_history_id AS alarmHistoryId, line_id AS lineId, alarm_code AS alarmCode, value, CASE WHEN read_at IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS isRead, created_at AS createdAt FROM ALARM_HISTORY WHERE alarm_history_id = #{alarmHistoryId} AND line_id = #{lineId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
